name: di-operacinis-centras
description: DI Pamoku Kurejas - edukacinis DI uzklausu generatorius mokytojams

scripts.test: npm run test:docs && node tests/structure.test.js && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:js

scripts.lint:html: npx html-validator-cli --file index.html && npx html-validator-cli --file privatumas.html
